/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/openspodes_test_phase1.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/openspodes_test_phase1.dir/tests/test_phase1.c.o CMakeFiles/openspodes_test_phase1.dir/tests/fixtures/ic_spodes_fixtures.c.o -o openspodes_test_phase1  libopenspodes.a _deps/cmocka-build/src/libcmocka.a
